mapper.insert: INSERT INTO routing_history ( question, routed_agent, routing_method, confidence_score, is_success, user_feedback, response_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{question}, #{routedAgent}, #{routingMethod}, #{confidenceScore}, #{isSuccess}, #{userFeedback}, #{responseTimeMs}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE routing_history SET user_feedback = #{feedback}, is_success = CASE WHEN #{feedback} LIKE '%满意%' OR #{feedback} LIKE '%正确%' OR #{feedback} LIKE '%好%' THEN true WHEN #{feedback} LIKE '%错误%' OR #{feedback} LIKE '%不对%' OR #{feedback} LIKE '%差%' THEN false ELSE is_success END WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT routed_agent, COUNT(*) as count FROM routing_history WHERE created_at >= #{since} GROUP BY routed_agent
